summary: User-facing docs sweep for stdin-only CLI refactor: README.md/README.ko.md contain zero geas CLI examples; docs/reference/ has no --data/--file references (only unrelated hook-stdin mention in HOOKS.md); CLAUDE.md Key CLI commands list shows bare command forms without input-delivery flags, already coherent with stdin-only rule; CHANGELOG.md intentionally skipped per mission spec scope.out (Evolving phase handles version bump). No edits required — user-facing docs are coherent with the stdin-only CLI.
